items.key: (@@admin = 1 or exists(select 1 from sysunitrights r where r.user_id = @@userID and r.ma_dvcs = hrrmdot.ma_dvcs and r.r_new = 1)) and status = '1'
items.check: (@@admin = 1 or exists(select 1 from sysunitrights r where r.user_id = @@userID and r.ma_dvcs = hrrmdot.ma_dvcs and r.r_new = 1))

command.text: declare @message nvarchar(4000) select @message = 'active$hrRMTestInterviewSchedule(this);' &CommandWhenBeforeEdit; select @message as message return
declare @message nvarchar(4000) &CommandWhenBeforeEdit; select isnull(@message, '') as message return

select b.ten_dot%l, b.ngay_tu, b.ngay_den, convert(varchar(19), a.datetime2, 121) as cookie from @@table a with(nolock) left join hrrmdot b with(nolock) on a.ma_dot = b.ma_dot where a.ma_dot = @ma_dot return

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đợt tuyển dụng %s đã được lập lịch kiểm tra, phỏng vấn.' else N'The code %s is invalid or already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đợt tuyển dụng %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The code %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đợt tuyển dụng hoặc chi tiết đã phát sinh, không thể lưu được.' else N'The item cannot be changed or deleted. It has already been used.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đợt tuyển dụng đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete this record. It has already been used.' end

if exists(select * from @@table where ma_dot = rtrim(@ma_dot)) begin select 'ma_dot' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_dot)) as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID update @hrrmlichct set ma_dot = @ma_dot

if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_dot = $ma_dot.OldValue) begin select 'ma_dot' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($ma_dot.OldValue)) as message return end if @ma_dot <> $ma_dot.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where (ma_dot = rtrim(@ma_dot) and ma_dot <> $ma_dot.OldValue)) begin select 'ma_dot' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_dot)) as message return end if exists(select * from hrrmlichctuv where ma_dot = $ma_dot.OldValue) begin select 'ma_dot' as field, @$updateConflict as message return end end
if exists(select 1 from hrrmlichctuv where ma_dot = $ma_dot.OldValue and stt_rec0lich not in (select stt_rec0 from @hrrmlichct)) begin select @$updateConflict as message return end
if $hrrmlichct.NewValue <> $hrrmlichct.OldValue begin delete hrrmlichct where ma_dot = $ma_dot.OldValue update @hrrmlichct set ma_dot = @ma_dot end

if @ma_dot <> $ma_dot.OldValue update hrrmlichct set ma_dot = @ma_dot where ma_dot = $ma_dot.OldValue if $hrrmlichct.NewValue <> $hrrmlichct.OldValue insert into hrrmlichct select * from @hrrmlichct update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_dot = @ma_dot
delete hrrmlichct where ma_dot = @ma_dot delete hrrmlichctuv where ma_dot = @ma_dot

action.text: if exists(select 1 from hrrmdot where ma_dot = @ma_dot) begin select ma_dvcs, ngay_tu, ngay_den from hrrmdot where ma_dot = @ma_dot return end
